hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend/"*.py) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend" && uv run ruff format --quiet "$f");; "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend/"*.ts|"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend/"*.tsx|"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend/"*.js|"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend/"*.jsx|"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend/"*.json|"$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend/"*.md) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/frontend" && pnpm exec prettier --write --log-level=error "$f");; esac
